mapper.select: SELECT s.id, f.name AS franchise_name, s.year, s.month, s.return_quantity, s.created_at, s.updated_at, s.is_deleted, s.deleted_reason, s.deleted_at, s.product_id, p.name AS product_name, s.franchise_id FROM franchise_return_product_stat s JOIN franchise f ON s.franchise_id = f.id JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id WHERE f.manager_id = #{userId} AND f.id = #{franchiseId}

SELECT s.id, f.name AS franchise_name, s.year, s.month, s.return_quantity, s.created_at, s.updated_at, s.is_deleted, s.deleted_reason, s.deleted_at, s.product_id, p.name AS product_name, s.franchise_id FROM franchise_return_product_stat s JOIN franchise f ON s.franchise_id = f.id JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id
SELECT name FROM duty WHERE id = #{dutyId}
SELECT dept_code FROM department WHERE id = #{departmentId}
